title: 4 Inch ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Tanto Point Hunting Neck Knife - Blue
description:
This wearable neck knife is the perfect tool for anyone who needs convenient yet durable stabbing and cutting ability. With a dagger style blade measuring 4", the knife is not only discrete and easy to carry at all times. With an extremely sharp tip you can pierce most anything with this durable but compact design. The knife comes with a blue necklace style thick plastic sheath that offers protection and convenience with a lock in place pin to hold the knife handle down steadily. The security sheath prevents the knife from falling out while wearing it around your neck, and can be worn on your pocket or belt with additional attached clip
